string.description: Character string type, the default type for variables and fields in AWK

number.description: Numeric type, either integer or floating-point depending on context

array.description: Associative array indexed by string keys, the primary data structure in AWK

ARGV.description: Array of command-line arguments passed to the AWK program

ENVIRON.description: Associative array of environment variable names and their values

regex.description: Regular expression pattern enclosed in forward slashes, used for matching and substitution
